name: qris-converter
description: Konverter QRIS Statis ke Dinamis dengan Nominal Otomatis (EMVCo & BI GPN Compliant)
author: Open Source Community

scripts.build:js: npx esbuild src/scripts/app.js --bundle --outfile=dist/js/app.bundle.js --format=iife --platform=browser && npx esbuild src/scripts/login.js --bundle --outfile=dist/js/login.bundle.js --format=iife --platform=browser
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
